options: depends on the masses of the objects and the distance between them&nbsp; /
only depends on the distance between the objects&nbsp; /
does not depend on either the masses of the objects or the distance between them&nbsp; /

questions.statement: The growth of plants occurs only in certain specific regions because:
options: the dividing tissue, also known as meristematic tissue, is located only at these regions /
the complex permanent tissue is located only at these regions&nbsp; /
the connective tissue is located only at these regions&nbsp; /
the simple permanent tissue is located only at these regions&nbsp; /
